creator: freebsd-bug-report-yf@yf.bsdclub.org
text:
(In reply to TAKATSU Tomonari from comment #1)
You are right. CVE-2016-6893 does not affect to mailman 2.1.14+j7.

My mailman branch descended from mailman 2.1.14+j7 seems to be accepted
merge from lp:mailman/2.1 branch, but it was merge back from tkikuchi's branch.
so I confused. I'm very sorry.
